% % auto-generated by scripts/p33_ood_table.py -- do not hand-edit
% Policy vs the per-instance best of FIFO/MOR/SPT/MWKR, the same
% baseline in distribution and out of it.
\newcommand{\OodSetupX}{1.76}  % mean setup magnitude, shifted arm / published arm
\newcommand{\OodWindowX}{2.53}  % mean outage density, shifted arm / published arm
\newcommand{\OodInfeas}{0}  % infeasible schedules over both shifted arms and all 8 regimes
\newcommand{\OodFloor}{0.00}  % largest drift on a PLACEBO cell: the resampling noise floor (pp)
\newcommand{\OodPlacebo}{8}\newcommand{\OodTreated}{8}  % cells where the shifted constraint is inactive / active
\newcommand{\OodHurt}{4}\newcommand{\OodHelped}{4}  % treated cells whose lead shrank / grew by more than the noise floor
\newcommand{\OodTied}{3}  % treated cells where the policy is no longer statistically ahead
\newcommand{\OodReversed}{0}  % treated cells where the rules actually overtook the policy
\newcommand{\OodIndN}{-1.34}\newcommand{\OodIndNLo}{-1.78}\newcommand{\OodIndNHi}{-0.92}  % ind N: policy vs best rule (%), CI
